expectations.text: The agent triggers the workout-chart skill rather than trying to fetch data manually
expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md and followed its structured steps rather than improvising

expectations.text: The agent uses the bundled generate_chart.py script (not a custom one)
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly referenced and ran scripts/generate_chart.py from the skill directory

expectations.text: The agent reports the file path of the saved PNG
expectations.evidence: Script printed chart path and agent confirmed it to the user
